author: terencechain
content: side comment, ppl that care about rollback could also track head event end point via beacon api that should indicates empty/full, this is the same as CL calling FCU and getting it via execution's end point

author: potuz
content:
<@520034910149410861> how do you feel about putting the honest payload reorg feature in the spec to reorg payloads that were attested late by the PTC, instead of leaving it as implementation detail? 

With this we can use pricing to prevent the Payload executing into the next slot. At 150M we are seeing some Payloads taking 13 seconds in some cases
